label: Nemotron ASR (oMLX, local)
note: Supports 40 language-locales including hu-HU. See app/language_map.py for the full per-model language list. The `language_hint` field accepts locale codes (e.g. "hu-HU"), not bare ISO codes. Leave empty for auto-detect.

fields.label: Language hint (optional)
fields.help: Leave empty for auto-detect (recommended -- this is a bidirectional pipeline, so locking to one language will misdetect the other). Verified live against oMLX's /v1/audio/transcriptions: omitting this field correctly auto-detects; setting it to the wrong language silently breaks transcription.
